arts.ttl: Wayne Rooney and Gary Neville agree on Ange Postecoglou Tottenham future as Ian Wright weighs in
arts.sum: Speaking on the Stick to Football podcast by Sky Sports, Rooney and Neville weighed in on the Tottenham boss' future. Then, when asked about Tottenham's recent defeats to Everton and Leicester City by Neville, Wright added: "What I’m trying to say is from the injury point of view, I think it's massive, it's massive."

arts.ttl: Gary Neville predicts when Daniel Levy will sack Ange Postecoglou as Tottenham fear revealed
arts.sum: Speaking on the Stick to Football podcast by Sky Sports, the former Manchester United defender said: "If he loses the second leg of the Carabao Cup to Liverpool and he goes out of the FA Cup, I think that it will become so toxic that Daniel Ley will act. But, if Spurs were to be knocked out of either of the domestic cup competitions, then Neville believes it could cost Postecoglou his position .

arts.ttl: Every word Ange Postecoglou said on transfer news, his future, Romero update, Maddison and Yang
arts.sum: What is important to me is my responsibility to...as I said, people can choose to ignore it, but we're still in a great position this year, I'm going to push this group of players and everyone at the club to not lose sight of the fact that this is a tough spot we're in but the possibilities of us doing something special are still there if we work our way through it. He was asked about his future, the latest transfer news around the club, injury updates both positive and negative as well as the imminent loan for Yang Min-hyeok to QPR.

arts.ttl: Ian Wright lays into Daniel Levy as Arsenal legend and Wayne Rooney agree on Tottenham future
arts.sum: Speaking on the Stick to Football podcast by Sky Sports, Wayne Rooney and Wright reflected on Levy's time at Tottenham . Ian Wright has slammed Daniel Levy for mismanaging Tottenham Hotspur over the years.

arts.ttl: Major Mathys Tel transfer update as Tottenham 'agree £50m deal'
arts.sum: According to reports in France, Spurs have agreed a deal with Bayern Munich to sign Mathys Tel. The 19-year-old is the subject of plenty of interest from the Premier League, with Chelsea and Manchester United also interested. The Tottenham head coach has been crying out for new signings in the January transfer window for weeks, admitting his current squad "needs help".

arts.ttl: Daniel Levy net worth and whopping Tottenham payday as Ange Postecoglou sack decision made
arts.sum: Daniel Levy will be forced to make a difficult decision by the end of the season, with Tottenham Hotspur in danger of failing to qualify for European football. In April 2024, Tottenham's financial results showed Levy was paid £3.581m in 2023, which was up from £3.265m the previous year, and received an accrued bonus of £3m paid across the year.

arts.ttl: Mauricio Pochettino makes decision on returning to Tottenham to replace Ange Postecoglou
arts.sum: Ange Postecoglou's future as Tottenham manager has been the subject of intense speculation this week following a run of six defeats and one draw across their last seven Premier League games

arts.ttl: Sources: Spurs agree €60m Tel deal with Bayern
arts.sum: Tottenham Hotspur have had a €60 million ($62.5m) offer accepted by Bayern Munich on Thursday for their French forward Mathys Tel, sources have told ESPN.

arts.ttl: Son, Romero and Kulusevski have now all made comments which Daniel Levy needs to take note of at Tottenham
arts.sum: The pressure is continuing to build on Daniel Levy with Dejan Kulusevski the latest Tottenham Hotspur player to call for help from the club. Tottenham...

arts.ttl: Report: Tottenham take big step closer to signing Mathys Tel ahead of Arsenal
